seed.name: execute_js
seed.content: {"success":false,"error":"Evaluating a string as JavaScript violates the following Content Security Policy directive because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'."}

antiPatterns.reason: CSP blocks ALL eval, not just this particular string. gpt-4o xpx9t9 made this mistake.

expected.successRubric: Pivot to read_page or get_accessibility_tree — the page reads back the form value and the counter. CSP will block any execute_js variant.
